mapper.select:
SELECT m.seq, m.name, m.phone_number AS phoneNumber, md.level, md.language, m.info, m.comment, m.join_date AS joinDate, md.signup_channel AS signupChannel, si.status AS staffStatus, m.created_date AS createdDate, m.last_update_date AS lastUpdateDate FROM complex_members m LEFT JOIN complex_member_metadata md ON md.member_seq = m.seq LEFT JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = m.seq
ORDER BY m.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
